skills.name: aoa-change-protocol
skills.band_summary: Scoped change execution and explicit verification.
skills.summary: Bounded workflow for Codex to plan a change, keep it scoped, verify it explicitly, and report it clearly.
skills.summary_short: Plan, scope, verify, and report a bounded change.
skills.description: Plan and execute a bounded repository change with explicit verification and reporting.
skills.primary_positive_prompt: Make a bounded repository change with a clear verification step and a final report.
skills.primary_negative_prompt: Take a tiny wording pass with no meaningful validation needs.

skills.name: aoa-context-scan
skills.band_summary: Small bounded orientation and boundary surfacing before deeper execution.
skills.summary: Small context scan skill for bounded repository orientation before a change.
skills.summary_short: Scan just enough repo context before acting.
skills.description: Scan the repository just far enough to understand the relevant files, constraints, and next bounded surface.
skills.primary_positive_prompt: Before changing anything, do a bounded repo scan to identify the relevant files and stop once the key surfaces are clear.
skills.primary_negative_prompt: Apply the code change and verify it with tests right away.
